comments.body:
## Description

Create plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/value-effort-scorer.md containing:
- Title and purpose: standalone sub-workflow for value/effort scoring of epics
- Value scale (1-5): definitions for each level (1=minimal impact to 5=critical business impact)
- Effort scale (1-5): definitions for each level (1=trivial to 5=multi-sprint)
- Priority matrix: 5x5 grid mapping value x effort to P0-P4:
  - High value low effort (5,1) → P0; High value high effort (5,5) → P1
  - Medium value low effort (3,1) → P1; Medium value medium effort (3,3) → P2
  - Low value low effort (1,1) → P3; Low value high effort (1,5) → P4
- Example scoring for a sample epic
- Written skill-agnostic — both brainstorm and roadmap invoke identically

NOTE: Scaffolding commit — scorer exists but is unreferenced until Tasks 3 and 4.

## File Impact
- CREATE: plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/value-effort-scorer.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Scorer file exists and is non-empty
  Verify: test -s $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/value-effort-scorer.md
- [ ] Scorer contains P0-P4 matrix
  Verify: grep -c 'P[0-4]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/value-effort-scorer.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Scorer contains 1-5 scales
  Verify: grep -qi 'value.*1-5\|1-5.*value' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/value-effort-scorer.md
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendment (critical)
The scorer prompt must define explicit input/output contract:
INPUT: Epic title, epic description/success criteria, value assessment (1-5), effort assessment (1-5)
OUTPUT: Recommended priority (P0-P4) with one-line rationale
The scorer is a PROMPT TEMPLATE read by the agent — not executable code. Both brainstorm and roadmap agents read the scorer prompt, perform the assessment inline, and use the recommended priority. No sub-agent dispatch needed.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ (scorer tests 1, 2, 5 GREEN; tests 3, 4, 6 remain RED — owned by brainstorm/roadmap SKILL.md tasks)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Shared value/effort scorer prompt created
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
